chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Made Permissible and Prohibited in Marriage

text: 4418 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "إِيَّاكُمْ وَ تَزْوِيجَ اَلْمُطَلَّقَاتِ ثَلاَثاً فِي مَجْلِسٍ وَاحِدٍ فَإِنَّهُنَّ ذَوَاتُ أَزْوَاجٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4418 - Imam (as) said: "Beware of marrying women who have been divorced three times in a single sitting, for they are still considered to have spouses."
